title: grewia hornbyi
intro: Grewia hornbyi, also known as the Hornby's cluster fig, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is native to India and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Grewia hornbyi can be made into teas, decoctions, and infusions, and are often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
